name: Grade 11 Mathematics — Semester 2
description: An 18-week Grade 11 pathway for discrete mathematics, probability, financial modeling, and mathematical argument. Learning advances through inquiry, practice, authentic application, revision, and communication.
learningGoals: Develop grade 11 knowledge and transferable skills in discrete mathematics, probability, financial modeling, and mathematical argument.
Use appropriate evidence, vocabulary, tools, and methods to explain reasoning.
Plan, revise, collaborate responsibly, and communicate a well-supported conclusion.
